app.tagline: Honest system cleanup · Open Source · no telemetry
theme.toggleTooltip: Switch design between light and dark
dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.subtitle: An honest look at your system – real measurements only.
score.explanation.clean: No measurable issues found – all clear.
reco.reclaimable.title: {0} reclaimable
reco.driveFull.title: Drive {0} is {1} % full
reco.driveFull.text: Only {0} left. Cleaning frees up space.
reco.startup.title: Review {0} startup programs
reco.startup.textHigh: {0} of them with high impact – disabling can speed up startup.
reco.startup.textMany: Many programs start with Windows – check what you really need.
reco.ram.title: High RAM usage ({0} %)
reco.ram.text: Information only: close programs you don't need. OpenClean does not "free" memory.
reco.allGood.title: All clear
reco.allGood.text: No measurable issues found. Your system is clean and well utilized.
system.title: Storage & RAM
system.subtitle: Detailed view – pure information, no "optimization" or "RAM booster".
startup.title: Startup
startup.subtitle: Programs that start with Windows. Turn off what you don't need.
startup.policyTooltip: Set by group policy – cannot be toggled via OpenClean
startup.taskSchedulerNote: Note: Task Scheduler entries are not shown at this time.
startup.error.noTaskKey: No task key known for this Store app.
startup.error.taskKeyMissing: Task key of the Store app not found.
updater.title: Software updates
updater.subtitle: Update outdated programs via winget – you decide what gets updated.
updater.status.none: All programs are up to date.
updater.status.wingetMissing: winget was not found. Install the “App Installer” from the Microsoft Store to use updates.
updater.confirm.title: Confirm update
updater.confirm.single:
“{0}” will be updated from version {1} to {2}.

Do you want to continue?
updater.confirm.all:
{0} program(s) will be updated via winget.

Do you want to continue?
cleaner.title: Cleanup
cleaner.subtitle: Preview before deletion – you decide what gets removed.
cleaner.emptyPreview: No files found – traces appear here after analyzing.
cleaner.status.ready: Ready. Click “Analyze” to see what can be cleaned.
cleaner.status.doneSelectable: Analysis complete. Review the list and click “Clean”.
cleaner.status.doneEmpty: Analysis complete – nothing to clean found.
cleaner.confirm.message:
{0} object(s) totaling {1} will be permanently deleted.

Do you want to continue?
privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Preview before deletion – you decide which traces are removed.
privacy.emptyPreview: No entries found – traces appear here after analyzing.
privacy.status.ready: Ready. Click “Analyze” to see which traces can be removed.
privacy.status.doneSelectable: Analysis complete. Review the list and click “Clean”.
privacy.status.doneEmpty: Analysis complete – no removable traces found.
privacy.confirm.intro: {0} entry/entries from the following categories will be permanently deleted:
privacy.confirm.cookieWarning: ⚠ WARNING: Included cookies will be removed. You will be signed out of the affected websites and must sign in again.
privacy.browserHistory.name: Browser history
privacy.browserHistory.description: Recently visited websites in Chrome, Edge, Brave and Firefox.
privacy.cookies.name: Cookies
privacy.cookies.description: Stored cookies per website – deleting ends active sign-ins.
privacy.recentFiles.name: Recently used files
privacy.recentFiles.description: The list of recently opened files and folders (Windows Recent).
privacy.officeMru.name: Office history
privacy.officeMru.description: Documents recently opened in Word, Excel and PowerPoint (MRU).
privacy.explorerSearch.name: Explorer search history
privacy.explorerSearch.description: Terms recently searched in File Explorer.
privacy.startMenuSearch.name: Start menu search history
privacy.startMenuSearch.description: Terms recently typed into Windows search.
privacy.clipboard.name: Clipboard
privacy.clipboard.description: The current contents of the Windows clipboard.
privacy.mediaPlayer.name: Media player history
privacy.mediaPlayer.description: Recently played media in VLC media player and Windows Media Player.
confirm.title: Confirm cleanup
cleanup.recycleBin.name: Recycle Bin
cat.windowsTemp.name: Windows Temp
cat.windowsTemp.description: Temporary files from Windows and programs (%TEMP%, C:\Windows\Temp).
cat.updateCache.name: Windows Update cache
cat.updateCache.description: Already installed update downloads (SoftwareDistribution\Download). Requires admin.
cat.thumbnails.name: Thumbnail cache
cat.chrome.name: Google Chrome
cat.chrome.description: Cached web content from Google Chrome (all profiles).
cat.edge.name: Microsoft Edge
cat.edge.description: Cached web content from Microsoft Edge (all profiles).
cat.brave.name: Brave
cat.brave.description: Cached web content from Brave (all profiles).
cat.firefox.name: Mozilla Firefox
cat.firefox.description: Cached web content from Mozilla Firefox (all profiles).
cat.inetCache.name: Internet cache (legacy/WinINet)
cat.appCache.name: App caches (AppData)
cat.appCache.description: Known cache folders of installed apps under %AppData% and %LocalAppData%.
cat.recycleBin.name: Recycle Bin
cat.recycleBin.description: Empties the Recycle Bin of all drives via the Windows shell.
